title: lathyrus gracilis
intro: Lathyrus gracilis, also known as the slender pea or grass pea, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and aiding in the management of diabetes. The roots and seeds of Lathyrus gracilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
